title: Charter (CHTR) Q1 Earnings Lag, Internet User Base Up Y/Y
text: Charter's (CHTR) first-quarter 2023 results reflect continued growth in Internet and mobile service revenues.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) came out with quarterly earnings of $6.65 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.21 per share. This compares to earnings of $6.90 per share a year ago.

title: Charter Announces First Quarter 2023 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , April 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three months ended March 31, 2023.

title: What Does Warren Buffett See in Charter Communications?
text: On Sept. 2, 2021, Charter Communications Inc. ( CHTR , Financial) hit an all-time high: $$818.21. Since then, the share price has melted away like ice cream in August.

title: What's in Store for Charter Communications' (CHTR) Q1 Earnings?
text: Charter Communications' (CHTR) first-quarter 2023 performance is likely to have benefited from expanding broadband network in rural regions, despite stiff competition and slow subscriber addition.

title: CHARTER PROMOTES PAUL WOELK TO SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT, CABLE OPERATIONS BUSINESS PLANNING
text: Veteran Industry Executive Jim Nuzzo Announces Plans to Retire in 2024 STAMFORD, Conn. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) today announced that industry veteran Jim Nuzzo, Executive Vice President, Business Planning and FP&A plans to retire in early 2024.

title: 7 Stocks to Sell in April Before They Crash and Burn
text: The markets may be showing solid signs of improvement, but there are still many stocks to sell. In fact, in this environment of elevated interest rates, stocks with unrealistically high valuations are likely to come back to earth sooner rather than later.

title: Modern Hire's Client Charter Communications, Inc. Named Winner of the SIOP and SHRM 2023 HRM Impact Award
text: Award recognizes Charter's work with Modern Hire to implement state-of-the-science staffing process, providing more efficient, quality hiring, improved candidate engagement and retention

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy in April 2023
text: It's a great time to be looking at undervalued Warren Buffett stocks. With inflation, geopolitical crises, and a potential recession all causing economic uncertainty, investors are seeking safe investments with a strong margin of safety.

title: Charter to Hold Webcast to Discuss First Quarter 2023 Financial and Operating Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , April 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (the "Company" or "Charter") will host a webcast on Friday, April 28, 2023 at 8:30 a.m.
